# GitHub Topics/Tags Recommendations

Add these topics to your GitHub repository for better discoverability:

## Primary Topics (Most Important)
- `protein-structure`
- `pdb-files`
- `bioinformatics`
- `structural-biology`
- `peptide-generation`
- `protein-data-bank`

## Secondary Topics
- `molecular-modeling`
- `computational-structural-biology`
- `nmr-spectroscopy`
- `python`
- `educational-tool`
- `ramachandran`
- `secondary-structure`
- `protein-folding`
- `testing-tools`
- `biotite`

## How to Add Topics

1. Go to your GitHub repository
2. Click "About" (gear icon) in the right sidebar
3. Add topics in the "Topics" field
4. Save changes

## Repository Description

Use this one-liner for the GitHub repository description:

```
Generate realistic PDB files with mixed secondary structures for testing, education, and bioinformatics tool development
```

## Social Media Hashtags

When sharing on Twitter/X or other platforms:

```
#bioinformatics #structuralbiology #proteinstructure #python #opensource #pdb #molecularmodeling #education
```

## Suggested Communities to Share

- r/bioinformatics (Reddit)
- BioStars (https://www.biostars.org/)
- Bioinformatics StackExchange
- ResearchGate
- Twitter/X with #bioinformatics tag
